title: Avoimen tieteen ja tutkimuksen talvipäivät 2026
content:
The Open Science and Research Winter Conference will take place on 16–17 November 2026 at the Finnish Meteorological Institute in Helsinki. The event is organised by the Finnish Meteorological Institute and the Open Science and Research Coordination. The theme of the 2026 Winter Days is “From Open to Operational.” The event will be held in a hybrid format. The main language of the event will be English.

Registration will open and the program will be published during autumn.
